notes: keypad(TRUE) emits smkx, mousemask enables xterm SGR+normal mouse reporting, and endwin disables it before the teardown -- byte-identical to libncursesw. The SGR mouse-report decode + getmouse (and the timing-dependent click coalescing) are not yet modeled.
oracle_method: link one keypad+mousemask C program against libncurses_cabi + the generated curses.h and against libncursesw; compare the full emitted stream
